fields.name: KASAT HWA
fields.description:
Also known as dry cupping, this is an ancient therapeutic technique that uses special
cups placed on the skin to stimulate blood circulation & naturally promote overall
health. This method helps to: Improve blood flow, Relieve muscle pain, and Support
the body’s natural healing process.
fields.description_en:
Also known as dry cupping, this is an ancient therapeutic technique that uses special
cups placed on the skin to stimulate blood circulation & naturally promote overall
health. This method helps to: Improve blood flow, Relieve muscle pain, and Support
the body’s natural healing process.
fields.description_ar:
ً المعروف أيضا باسم الحجامة الجافة، هو أسلوب علاجي قديم يستخدم كاسات مخصصة على الجلد لتحفيز
الدورة الدموية وتعزيز صحة الجسم بشكل طبيعي وتساعد هذه التقنية على: تحسين تدفق الدم، تخفيف
الالام العضلية وتعزيز الشفاء الطبيعي للجسم

fields.name: SWEIDISH MASSAGE
fields.description:
Swedish massage is a type of therapeutic massage aimed at relaxation, relieving
stress and muscle tension, improving blood circulation, and increasing muscle
flexibility. It is highly beneficial for those who engage in physical exercise.
fields.description_en:
Swedish massage is a type of therapeutic massage aimed at relaxation, relieving

fields.name: FOOT MASSAGE
fields.description: Body comfort starts from the feet, and the feet are a map of all the body’s organs. Foot massage helps relieve stress and promote relaxation, and it also helps in treating migraines, joint pain, and foot swelling.
fields.description_en: Body comfort starts from the feet, and the feet are a map of all the body’s organs. Foot massage helps relieve stress and promote relaxation, and it also helps in treating migraines, joint pain, and foot swelling.

fields.name: THAI MASSAGE
fields.description:
Traditional Thai massage is an ancient physical therapy that relies on a
combination of pressure, stretching, and extension of various body muscles.
This technique helps to:

Improve flexibility
Reduce stress and tension
Relieve back and muscle pain
Enhance blood circulation
fields.description_en:
Traditional Thai massage is an ancient physical therapy that relies on a
combination of pressure, stretching, and extension of various body muscles.
This technique helps to:

Improve flexibility
Reduce stress and tension
Relieve back and muscle pain
Enhance blood circulation
fields.description_ar:
المساج التايلندي التقليدي هو علاج جسدي قديم يعتمد على مزيج من الضغط والشد والتمــــدد
لمختلف عضلات الجســـم. تساعد هذه التقنية على
تحسيـــــــــــــــــن المـــــــــــــــرونة
تخفيـــــــــف التوتر واجهـــــــــاد

fields.name: AFTER DELIVERY MASSAGE
fields.description:
This massage is designed specifically for women after childbirth, and it helps with:
Restoring the uterus to its natural position after delivery.
Relieving back and abdominal pain caused by pregnancy and childbirth.
Promoting overall relaxation and restoring energy after the pregnancy period
fields.description_en:
This massage is designed specifically for women after childbirth, and it helps with:
Restoring the uterus to its natural position after delivery.
Relieving back and abdominal pain caused by pregnancy and childbirth.
Promoting overall relaxation and restoring energy after the pregnancy period
fields.description_ar:
هذا المســــاج مخصص للنســـاء بعد الولادة، ويســــاعد على
إعــــــادة الرحــــــم لوضعـــــــــه الطبيعـــــــــــي بعــــــــــــد الولادة
تخفيـــف آلام الظهــر والبطــن النـــــــــــاتجة عن الحمــل والولادة
تعـــزيز الاسترخـــاء العـــام وتجديد الطـــــــــاقة بعد فترة الحمـل

fields.name: WOODEN LYMPHATIC MASSAGE (SLIMMING MASSAGE)
fields.description:
Stimulates blood and lymphatic circulation.
Helps the body eliminate toxins and retained fluids.
Reduces bloating, leaving a feeling of lightness & comfort.
Firms the skin, leaving it soft and radiant.
Relieves stress and provides deep relaxation.

fields.description: It helps relieve pain and fatigue, warm up and relax the muscles, which enhances
fields.description_en: It helps relieve pain and fatigue, warm up and relax the muscles, which enhances
fields.description_ar: يعمل على تخفيف الالم والارهاق وتدفئة العضلات وإرخائها، مما يعمل على زيادة استـــرخاء

fields.name: AFTER DELIVERY MASSAGE
fields.description:
This massage is designed specifically for women after childbirth, and it helps with:
Restoring the uterus to its natural position after delivery.
Relieving back and abdominal pain caused by pregnancy and childbirth.
Promoting overall relaxation and restoring energy after the pregnancy period
fields.description_en:
This massage is designed specifically for women after childbirth, and it helps with:
Restoring the uterus to its natural position after delivery.
Relieving back and abdominal pain caused by pregnancy and childbirth.
Promoting overall relaxation and restoring energy after the pregnancy period
fields.description_ar:
هذا المســــاج مخصص للنســـاء بعد الولادة، ويســــاعد على
إعــــــادة الرحــــــم لوضعـــــــــه الطبيعـــــــــــي بعــــــــــــد الولادة
تخفيـــف آلام الظهــر والبطــن النـــــــــــاتجة عن الحمــل والولادة
تعـــزيز الاسترخـــاء العـــام وتجديد الطـــــــــاقة بعد فترة الحمـل

fields.name: PREGNANT MASSAGE
fields.description:
This massage caters to the needs of women during pregnancy, providing comfort
and relaxation, relieving pain, improving blood circulation, and reducing swelling
and foot edema
fields.description_en:
This massage caters to the needs of women during pregnancy, providing comfort
and relaxation, relieving pain, improving blood circulation, and reducing swelling
and foot edema
fields.description_ar:
المساج الذي يلبي احتياجات المرأة أثناء فترة الحمل يعمل على توفير الراحة والاسترخاء وتخفيف
الام وتحسين الدورة الدموية وتخفيف انتفاخات وتورم القدم

fields.name: STRESS RELES MASSAGE
fields.description:
It is a massage that relieves stress and anxiety by reducing the stress hormone and
increasing the happiness hormone, which helps improve mood and reduces feelings
of tension and anxiety
fields.description_en:
It is a massage that relieves stress and anxiety by reducing the stress hormone and
increasing the happiness hormone, which helps improve mood and reduces feelings
of tension and anxiety
fields.description_ar:
هو مساج إزالة التوتر والقلق عن طريق خفض هرمون التوتر وزيادة هرمون السعادة مما يساعد
على تعديل المزاج ويقلل من الشعور بالتوتر والقلق

fields.name: WOODEN LYMPHATIC MASSAGE (SLIMMING MASSAGE)
fields.description:
Stimulates blood and lymphatic circulation.
Helps the body eliminate toxins and retained fluids.
Reduces bloating, leaving a feeling of lightness & comfort.
Firms the skin, leaving it soft and radiant.
Relieves stress and provides deep relaxation.
fields.description_en:
Stimulates blood and lymphatic circulation.
Helps the body eliminate toxins and retained fluids.
Reduces bloating, leaving a feeling of lightness & comfort.
Firms the skin, leaving it soft and radiant.
Relieves stress and provides deep relaxation.
fields.description_ar: يحفز الدورة الدموية واللمفاوية ، يساعد الجسم يتخلص من السموم والسوائل المحتبسـة ، يقلل الانتفاخ ويعطي إحساس بالخفــــة والراحة ، يشد البشرة ويتركها ناعمة ومشرقة ، يخفف التوتر ويمنح استرخاء عميق
